description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer-style axe with a thick, rectangular metal head featuring a prominent light blue triquetra symbol on one side. The head is dark gray, textured, and appears forged, with slightly beveled edges and a flat striking surface. The handle is made of wood, showing a natural grain pattern and a medium brown color, and is wrapped in dark leather strips for improved grip. The handle is straight and cylindrical, tapering slightly towards the bottom, and the leather wrapping covers the lower half. The overall design suggests durability and heavy-duty use, suitable for demolition or heavy striking tasks. The axe has a rugged, utilitarian appearance with a touch of decorative flair from the symbol.
description: A heavy, rectangular-headed sledgehammer axe with a wooden handle wrapped in dark leather and a blue triquetra symbol on the head. The design is rugged and functional, with a touch of decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the metal head with the blue triquetra symbol and the straight, wood-grain handle wrapped in leather.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the axe head and the cylindrical handle, with the leather wrapping visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but the triquetra symbol is not visible; the handle and leather wrapping are clearly seen.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other narrow face of the head and the handle, with the leather grip prominent.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with visible grain, wrapped in dark leather strips for grip, no curvature.
attribute_blade_design: Thick, rectangular sledgehammer-style head with flat striking faces, no sharp edge, and a blue triquetra symbol on one side.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the head fitted onto the handle.
